grant_title: Rhode Island Corporate Expansion & Small Business Grants (2026)
project_area: Business expansion, R&D, job creation, real estate development, commercial district improvements, supply chain support, and industry-specific initiatives (Blue Economy, Design & Food, Biotech, Offshore Wind, Defense, Cybersecurity, Data Analytics, Composites)
demographic_requirements: Priority given to businesses registered in Rhode Island, partnering with Rhode Island universities/hospitals (for Innovation Vouchers), creating jobs above median wage (for Qualified Jobs Incentive), and operating in priority sectors (Blue Economy, Design & Food, Biotech). Additional preferences for women-owned and minority-owned businesses.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants must be registered and operating in Rhode Island, with specific requirements varying by program (e.g., Innovation Vouchers require partnership with a Rhode Island university/hospital, Qualified Jobs Incentive requires job creation above median wage, Rebuild Rhode Island targets real estate development with financing gaps). General requirements include being a legal entity in Rhode Island, good standing with state tax authorities, and compliance with program-specific criteria.
